Lysara Karstark
Marna Locke, Lysara Karstark and Lyarra Stark by coldraindropsss

Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Lysara Karstark was a noblewoman from House Karstark during the third century of the Targaryen era. She was married to Artos Stark, the third son of Lord Beron Stark of Winterfell, and had twin sons by him; Brandon and Benjen Stark.[2]

Family[ ]

Lysara's relation to Lady Alys Karstark, her husband's grandmother, is unknown.
